body:
This PR updates Oceananigans to incorporate the non-uniform conformal cubed sphere grid that has now been moved to [PR#41](https://github.com/CliMA/CubedSphere.jl/pull/41) of the [CubedSphere.jl](https://github.com/CliMA/CubedSphere.jl) repository.

The conformal mapping technique constructs a more uniform cubed sphere grid by starting from an irregularly spaced reference grid (using exponential or geometric spacing) and mapping it onto each panel of the cubed sphere. The resulting grid improves isotropy and increases the minimum cell size (particularly at corners), thereby mitigating CFL restrictions and enabling larger time steps. The method also includes the option of applying Ensemble Kalman Inversion (EKI) to further optimize grid quality by steering diagnostics such as isotropy and minimum cell width toward target values.

In Oceananigans, this PR adds support for the new non-uniform conformal cubed sphere grid provided by CubedSphere.jl.

Note:
- The new non-uniform grid-generation code resides in [PR#41](https://github.com/CliMA/CubedSphere.jl/pull/41) of [CubedSphere.jl](https://github.com/CliMA/CubedSphere.jl) (branch [sb/non-uniform-conformal-mapping](https://github.com/CliMA/CubedSphere.jl/tree/sb/non-uniform-conformal-mapping)).
- Once that PR is merged into the main branch of [CubedSphere.jl](https://github.com/CliMA/CubedSphere.jl) [Oceananigans.jl](https://github.com/CliMA/Oceananigans.jl) will import directly from there.
- In the meantime, to run this branch, please add the [CubedSphere.jl](https://github.com/CliMA/CubedSphere.jl) [PR#41](https://github.com/CliMA/CubedSphere.jl/pull/41) branch to your environment manually:

```
(Oceananigans) pkg> add https://github.com/CliMA/CubedSphere.jl#sb/non-uniform-conformal-mapping
```
title: (0.100.7) Update Oceananigans to use non-uniform conformal cubed sphere grid from CubedSphere.jl
